title: package-name attributes + manifests
manager: Package-name attributes with per-manager overrides, emitted as proper manifests for every package ecosystem (npm, cargo, pip, nuget, composer, gem). This is the fourth build artifact: a machine ships with a real, correct package manifest for whatever registry it is published to, so distributing an FSL machine as a native package becomes a generated step rather than hand-written boilerplate re-derived per ecosystem and inevitably wrong somewhere.
cs: package_name + per-manager overrides (npm/cargo/pip/nuget/composer/gem…) -> emitted manifests (the 4th artifact); native packaging per ecosystem.
